languages.text: "Что вам угодно, Лорд-капитан?" {n}Бригадир тщательно выговаривает каждое слово, слегка пошатываясь от усталости.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Что вам угодно, Лорд-капитан?" {n}Бригадир тщательно выговаривает каждое слово, слегка пошатываясь от усталости.{/n}

languages.text: "How may I serve you, Lord Captain?" {n}The foreman carefully enunciates every word, swaying slightly on his feet from exhaustion.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Что вам угодно, Лорд-капитан?" {n}Бригадир тщательно выговаривает каждое слово, слегка пошатываясь от усталости.{/n}

"How may I serve you, Lord Captain?" {n}The foreman carefully enunciates every word, swaying slightly on his feet from exhaustion.{/n}

languages.text: 「どうすればお役に立てるでしょうか、船長様？」{n}大工長は疲れて足がふらふらしながら、丁寧に言葉を紡ぎ出す.{/n}
languages.original_text: "How may I serve you, Lord Captain?" {n}The foreman carefully enunciates every word, swaying slightly on his feet from exhaustion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「どうすればお役に立てるでしょうか、船長様？」{n}作業 foremanは疲れて足がふらふらしながら、丁寧に言葉を紡ぎ出す.{/n}

languages.text: "Size nasıl hizmet edebilirim Lord Kaptan?" {n}Ustabaşı, yorgunluktan olduğu yerde hafifçe sallanarak her bir kelimeyi dikkatle telaffuz ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "How may I serve you, Lord Captain?" {n}The foreman carefully enunciates every word, swaying slightly on his feet from exhaustion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Size nasıl hizmet edebilirim Lord Kaptan?" {n}Ustabaşı, yorgunluktan olduğu yerde hafifçe sallanarak her bir kelimeyi dikkatle telaffuz ediyor.{/n}

languages.text: «¿En qué puedo servirle, Lord Capitán?». {n}El capataz pronuncia cada palabra con sumo esmero, cambiando levemente de postura debido al cansancio.{/n}
languages.original_text: "How may I serve you, Lord Captain?" {n}The foreman carefully enunciates every word, swaying slightly on his feet from exhaustion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¿En qué puedo servirle, Lord Capitán?». {n}El capataz pronuncia cada palabra con sumo esmero, cambiando levemente de postura debido al cansancio.{/n}

languages.text: “舰长大人，有什么可以效劳的？”{n}工头一字一顿说得小心翼翼，疲惫的身躯微微晃动。{/n}
languages.original_text: "How may I serve you, Lord Captain?" {n}The foreman carefully enunciates every word, swaying slightly on his feet from exhaustion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，有什么可以效劳的？”{n}工头一字一顿说得小心翼翼，疲惫的身躯微微晃动。{/n}

languages.text: « Comment puis-je vous servir, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ? » {n}Le contremaître détache soigneusement chacun de ses mots, chancelant légèrement sur ses jambes tant il est épuisé.{/n}
languages.original_text: "How may I serve you, Lord Captain?" {n}The foreman carefully enunciates every word, swaying slightly on his feet from exhaustion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Comment puis-je vous servir, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ? » {n}Le contremaître détache soigneusement chacun de ses mots, chancelant légèrement sur ses jambes tant il est épuisé.{/n}

languages.text: "Wie kann ich Euch dienen, Lord Captain?" {n}Der vor Erschöpfung leicht wankende Vorarbeiter überlegt sich jedes Wort sehr genau.{/n}
